title: CI Golden Gate: opt into Node 24 for GitHub Actions
problem: Golden Gate CI emits Node.js 20 deprecation warnings for actions/checkout, setup-python, and setup-node. GitHub will force Node 24 on runners starting June 2026.
acceptance_criteria: golden-gate.yml sets FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 for the job.
CI meta-test asserts the env var is present.
Golden tests and pytest pass locally.
non_goals: Do not change public-site Node version unless required.
Do not bump action major versions in the same ticket unless needed.
